name: confluence-mcp-server
description: Basic MCP server for scoped Confluence search and page retrieval.

scripts.format: prettier --ignore-unknown --write README.md .gitignore .prettierignore .prettierrc.json eslint.config.js package.json docker-compose.yml docker-compose.server.yml .env.example .env.server.example "src/**/*.ts" "tests/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.sh" "docs/**/*.md" "deploy/**/*" "benchmarks/**/*.json"
scripts.format:check: prettier --ignore-unknown --check README.md .gitignore .prettierignore .prettierrc.json eslint.config.js package.json docker-compose.yml docker-compose.server.yml .env.example .env.server.example "src/**/*.ts" "tests/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.sh" "docs/**/*.md" "deploy/**/*" "benchmarks/**/*.json"
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
